editionData.title: July 10, 2026: U.S. intensifies strikes on Iran’s coast along Strait of Hormuz; Health workers fighting Ebola go on strike after months without pay
editionData.description: Global headlines: U.S. intensifies strikes on Iran’s coast along Strait of Hormuz (After President Donald Trump declared the collapse of a preliminary peace agreement on Wednesday, the U.S. and Iran traded renewed airstrikes); Health workers fighting Ebola go on strike after months without pay (Doctors and Nurses on the front lines of the Democratic Republic of Congo’s Ebola response have reached a breaking point); and U.S., Iran trade dozens more strikes in dangerous cycle (For a second straight day, the U.S. military attacked Iranian targets overnight and Iran struck back, targeting U.S. bases in Bahrain and Kuwait). Markets leaned higher, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 1.52% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Show HN: Getting GLM 5.2 running on my slow computer (Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦 -...); EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0 (Today, the European Parliament allowed the suspicionless mass scanning of private communications ("Chat Control 1.0") to pass, a measure...); and Show HN: 18 Words (A fast daily word challenge. Can you survive all 18 words). Product Hunt features ARKAD Wallet (Control your budget with voice), Auriko (Trading desk for LLM calls), and Aura: Agents + Git + Intent Open Source (OSS IDE for controlling AI coding agents with built in loops).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: U.S. intensifies strikes on Iran’s coast along Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: After President Donald Trump declared the collapse of a preliminary peace agreement on Wednesday, the U.S. and Iran traded renewed airstrikes.

headlines.title: Health workers fighting Ebola go on strike after months without pay
headlines.summary: Doctors and Nurses on the front lines of the Democratic Republic of Congo’s Ebola response have reached a breaking point.

headlines.title: U.S., Iran trade dozens more strikes in dangerous cycle
headlines.summary: For a second straight day, the U.S. military attacked Iranian targets overnight and Iran struck back, targeting U.S. bases in Bahrain and Kuwait.

headlines.title: After Greenland bluster, Trump surprises NATO allies with praise
headlines.summary: The president embraced the alliance in a meeting Wednesday, extolling member nations’ defense spending and saying nothing about the Danish territory, officials said.

headlines.title: In Iraq, huge crowds mourning Iranian leader reveal limits of U.S. role
headlines.summary: Some officials said the outpouring of grief was intended to show the continuing close ties between Iraq and Iran despite U.S. efforts to hold sway in Baghdad.

headlines.title: US and Ukraine agree on patriot missile production deal
headlines.summary: US President Donald Trump gave his blessing earlier this week to domestic Ukrainian production of the missiles.

headlines.title: China expands anti-sanctions toolkit, raising risks for foreign firms
headlines.summary: Beijing is rolling out measures to expand its ability to hit back at US and EU sanctions and export controls.

headlines.title: US and Iran halt attacks as mediators rush to get diplomacy back on track
headlines.summary: American official says technical talks with Tehran continue and the United States wants to pursue diplomacy.

headlines.title: UN seeks $300M for victims of Venezuela’s earthquakes
headlines.summary: The United Nations launched an appeal for roughly $300 million to assist survivors of Venezuela's earthquakes

headlines.title: New Mexico accuses US Justice Department of impeding Epstein investigation
headlines.summary: State Attorney General Raul Torrez accused the Trump administration of withholding records, harming his investigation.

headlines.title: President Trump cleans house at the bipartisan Election Assistance Commission
headlines.summary: With just months until the midterms, President Trump relieved the remaining members of the U.S. Election Assistance Commission, a move condemned by Democrats and voting rights advocates.

headlines.title: In private call, Education Dept. tried, but failed, to reassure disability advocates
headlines.summary: The disability community has long worried about what would happen if special education oversight moved from the Education Department to another agency. Now, those moves are becoming more real.

headlines.title: Trump's arch clears another hurdle, setting up a big debate: Do height limits apply?
headlines.summary: The Interior Department is arguing D.C. height limits don't apply to federal projects, bucking a century of precedent. If the panel reviewing Trump's arch agrees, experts say it could change the city.

headlines.title: France downs Morocco 2-0 to advance to the World Cup semifinal
headlines.summary: Morocco was no match for France, which lost 2-0. The French, one of the pre-tournament favorites, move on to the World Cup semifinals against either Spain or Belgium.

headlines.title: Smithsonian chief emphasizes 'accuracy and integrity' after White House report
headlines.summary: The memo from the Smithsonian's secretary, Lonnie Bunch, responded to a White House report that calls the National Museum of American History driven by "a radical, activist ideology."

headlines.title: India looks to broaden options
headlines.summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's recent visits to Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand are aimed at bolstering the nation's ties in the Asia-Pacific region. Amid increasingly complex and strained relations between the United States and India, New Delhi is looking to broaden its development options. Although Modi's visit could help ease near-term economic pressures, it remains unclear whether it will advance the country's long-term strategic goals, experts said.

headlines.title: US divergence sows discord at NATO summit
headlines.summary: NATO leaders left Turkiye on Wednesday after reaffirming their commitment to collective defense, but uncertainty now hangs over the alliance following US President Donald Trump's disruptive remarks.

headlines.title: 12 killed in southern Spain wildfire
headlines.summary: MADRID -- Twelve people were killed in a major wildfire that broke out on Thursday afternoon in Los Gallardos, in Almeria province of Spain's southern Andalusia region, according to the local emergency service.

headlines.title: Region on shaky ground as US, Iran trade attacks
headlines.summary: The situation in the Middle East remained on shaky ground after Washington and Tehran traded strikes for the second consecutive night, leaving a trail of casualties and keeping the region on edge with security alerts in Qatar and warning sirens in Kuwait and Bahrain.

headlines.title: Civic groups call for Japan to reflect on wartime past
headlines.summary: At a rally held by several Japanese civic groups on Tuesday, participants called on Japan to learn from history and guard against the resurgence of militarism.

headlines.title: Air India flight from Thiruvananthapuram to Bengaluru aborts takeoff after technical snag
headlines.summary: An Air India flight from Thiruvananthapuram to Bengaluru was aborted during takeoff due to technical issues. Passengers currently remain onboard.

headlines.title: Why is Gujarat betting ₹6 lakh crore on data centres? | Explained
headlines.summary: Gujarat's new Data Centre Policy aims to attract ₹6 lakh crore in investments, boosting its digital economy and infrastructure.

headlines.title: Bishnoi ran decentralised syndicate, wanted ‘S.K.’ killed to instill fear: U.S. DoJ
headlines.summary: U.S. DoJ reveals Lawrence Bishnoi's gang plotted to murder an Indian actor to instill fear and recruit impoverished minors.

headlines.title: Govt. receives WhatsApp’s reply on notice over ‘username’ feature
headlines.summary: The Indian government reviews WhatsApp's response regarding concerns over its controversial username feature amid potential online fraud risks.

headlines.title: Not a Modi breakthrough, Australia's ruling party approved uranium sales to India in 2011: Congress
headlines.summary: Congress disputes BJP's claim of a Modi breakthrough in Australia's uranium sales to India, citing earlier approval in 2011.

headlines.title: Yen rises as Japan woos pension funds into domestic assets
headlines.summary: Reuters: Yen rises as Japan woos pension funds into domestic assets.

headlines.title: Coinbase's top attorney who has led crypto's Washington fight to step down
headlines.summary: Reuters: Coinbase's top attorney who has led crypto's Washington fight to step down.

headlines.title: South African protesters go door-to-door forcing immigrants from their homes
headlines.summary: Reuters: South African protesters go door-to-door forcing immigrants from their homes.

headlines.title: Spain says Trump softened rhetoric after learning of Madrid's contributions to NATO
headlines.summary: Reuters: Spain says Trump softened rhetoric after learning of Madrid's contributions to NATO.

headlines.title: Convoy carrying Russian fighters attacked in Mali, sources say
headlines.summary: Reuters: Convoy carrying Russian fighters attacked in Mali, sources say.

hackerNews.title: The glass backbone: Why the Army's logistics will break in the next war
hackerNews.summary: The United States Army spent the last two decades optimizing sustainment for permissive environments defined by uncontested supply lines, contractor support, and static forward operating bases. As the National Defense Strategy shifts toward strategic competition and multidomain operations, however, this efficiency-driven model has become a liability.
